title: rosa canina var. fallax
intro: Rosa canina var. fallax, also known as the dog rose, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. fallax include its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and eye health. Rosa canina var. fallax can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
